published_prior_art.cite: rambachan2023parallel: fixed-M Honest-DiD sensitivity for aggregate event-study vectors; standard LP support-function duality covers the displayed dual form but not the cohort-aggregation quotient.

repo_prior_art.cite: q1_spectral_phase_transition/p1_markov is only a row-space phase-transition template, not an Honest-DiD aggregation support-function result.

published_prior_art.cite: liu2025cohortanchored: already argues aggregated event-study Honest-DiD can mislead under staggered adoption and moves inference to cohort-period block biases; proposal adds an active-face quotient certificate.

borusyak2024eventstudy and rothsantanna2023efficient study robust/efficient staggered event-study estimation, but not support-function rank-loss discontinuity of cohort-level Honest-DiD breakdown frontiers.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; the current epsilon-gap is a useful Liu-style quotient refinement, but flagship tier needs a demonstrably ex ante rank certificate rather than a face-local support-ratio diagnostic.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1 | Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The checklist misses Wright 2026 arXiv:2601.18801, which explicitly advertises staggered-adoption diagnostics and sensitivity-robust inference under restricted parallel-trend violations.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The proposal markets a row-space/singular-value certificate, but Delta_F is defined as h_agg,F/h_coh,F - 1, so the stated diagnostic still depends on the support quantities it is supposed to classify.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the Delta_F-as-support-ratio definition with a primitive matrix/rank condition stated directly in A, L, L_agg, ell, and Sigma, then prove it implies the support ordering on each active cell.
Add a direct comparison to Wright 2026 and explain whether its staggered-adoption sensitivity diagnostics subsume, overlap, or miss the proposed cohort-lift quotient norm.
Turn the stacked-map prototype into an explicit open-neighborhood proposition with perturbation radii for weights/trimming, not just an example plus conjectural persistence.

recommended_next_step: Revise the flagship claim so the quotient diagnostic is primitive and ex ante, then add the missing Wright comparison before re-review.
